overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a continuous walk through Night City's Japantown district. The player transitions from a steam-filled covered underpass to sunlit commercial streets with dense cyberpunk architecture, then through a traditional Japanese gateway into narrow neon-lit alleys with vending machines.

events.description: red sports car drives past on the right side of the road
pedestrian appears walking toward camera from the distance

agents.ego_description: walking along a curved concrete sidewalk under a large overpass structure with steam rising nearby

notable_agents.action: red sports car driving past on the adjacent road
pedestrian in light colored clothing walking toward the camera

large digital billboard displaying colorful anime-style character art with pink and blue tones
curved metal barrier with horizontal rails separating sidewalk from the road
tall industrial pole with multiple crossbars and hanging electrical wires
steam rising from grated vents in the concrete structure creating atmospheric haze

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a covered concrete walkway beneath a massive overpass structure. Steam rises from vents on the left while a large anime billboard hangs overhead. The camera moves forward along a curved path as a red sports car passes by on the right, and a pedestrian approaches from the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense cyberpunk commercial street with stacked buildings and elevated highways

events.description: exiting the covered underpass into bright open sunlight and dense urban architecture
HOTEL sign becomes visible as the camera rounds the curve and buildings come into view

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk passing multiple pedestrians while observing the dense cyberpunk cityscape

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in red shirt and dark pants walking toward the camera
pedestrian in dark clothing walking along the sidewalk in the same direction

entered.detail: large neon sign spelling HOTEL in bright pink letters mounted on a building
densely packed multi-level buildings with various advertisements, air conditioning units, and architectural details
massive concrete highway overpass structure spanning across the street ahead
modern street light pole with multiple fixture arms extending over the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The scene opens up into a bright sunlit commercial street with dense cyberpunk architecture. The camera passes pedestrians walking in the opposite direction while a prominent pink HOTEL sign becomes visible. Massive elevated highways loom in the distance above the stacked buildings.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street transitioning under traditional Japanese gateway with red lanterns

events.description: passing under traditional Japanese torii-style gateway with hanging red paper lanterns
entering darker shaded area as the camera moves deeper under the overpass structure

agents.ego_description: walking through a busy commercial area with mixed pedestrian traffic and traditional architectural elements

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in business suit walking ahead of the camera
street vendor standing near a storefront entrance

entered.detail: traditional wooden gateway with curved tiled roof and supporting pillars
hanging red paper lanterns with Japanese characters suspended from the gateway
multiple bright neon signs and holographic advertisements covering building facades
traditional style shop entrance with extended roof and signage

segments.scene_description: The camera moves through a transitional area featuring a blend of traditional Japanese and cyberpunk architecture. The player passes under a wooden gateway adorned with red lanterns while neon signs illuminate the right side. The elevated highway structure looms closer overhead as the lighting shifts to darker tones.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow cyberpunk alley with vending machines and teal neon lighting

events.description: entering narrow alleyway with prominent teal and cyan neon lighting and vending machines
approaching pair of illuminated vending machines at the end of the narrow passage

agents.ego_description: walking through a narrow alleyway examining the neon-lit storefronts and vending machines

notable_agents.action: person in blue jacket walking away from camera down the narrow alley

entered.detail: brightly lit green and red vending machine with BURRITO text and food item images
glowing circular teal neon sign mounted on the building wall ahead
concrete wall covered with colorful graffiti art and layered posters
metal security door with intercom system leading to residential units
blue illuminated vending machine with snack advertisements

segments.scene_description: The final segment takes place in a narrow enclosed alley illuminated by teal neon lights. The camera moves past a prominent burrito vending machine on the right and graffiti-covered walls on the left. The passage leads to a small courtyard area with additional vending machines and a residential entrance, creating an intimate cyberpunk atmosphere.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a steam-filled industrial underpass into the bright commercial heart of Japantown, eventually descending into a narrow, neon-lit alley. It begins in a covered concrete walkway where steam rises from vents beneath a massive overpass and a large anime billboard, moving forward as a red sports car flashes by. As the camera emerges from the tunnel, the environment opens into a sunlit street characterized by dense cyberpunk architecture, passing pedestrians and a prominent pink hotel sign under the shadow of distant elevated highways. The scene then shifts through a transitional gateway adorned with red lanterns and neon signs, where the lighting darkens as the overhead highway structures loom closer. Finally, the camera glides into a narrow enclosed alley illuminated by teal neon, passing a burrito vending machine and graffiti-covered walls before arriving at an intimate residential courtyard.
